description:
Specification

Product Information

Product Type :Single Box Product

Product Name:1 Set Nightstand with Adjustable LED Strip Light, 2-drawers, Large Storage Space, Suitable for Bedside Table, Coffee Table, Sofa Side Table or End Table for Study Desk

Main Color:Grey

Main Material:MDF

Product Dimensions

Assembled Length (in.):Not Applicable

Assembled Width (in.):Not Applicable

Assembled Height (in.):Not Applicable

Product Weight (lbs.):Not Applicable

Package Size

Length (in.):22.20

Width (in.):16.30

Height (in.):8.00

Weight (lbs.):36.50

Product Features

  • [Nightstand with Adjustable LED Strip Light] This LED light make it easy to see in the dark and also provide a soft, soothing light. The light strip is controlled by remote control. It will create a fantastic ambiance in your bedroom in the dark.
  • [Large Storage Space] This bedside nightstand is designed with 2 sliding drawers. The drawers provide plenty of space for storage small items, and the open compartment is convenient for daily use. For example, you can use it to store your books, headphones and other common items.
  • [Multi-purpose design] This 2-drawers nightstand with fashionable design and beautiful appearance can be used as bedside table, coffee table, sofa side table or end table for study desk. So it can be used in bedroom, living room, dining room, or the study and so on, just as you like.
  • [Durable and Sturdy Material] This bedside nightstand is of high quality, it is made of safe and environmentally friendly sturdy MDF board. And it is also easy to clean and maintain.
  • [Tips] If you are missing or damaging any parts, please contact us first and we will do our best to help you solve the problem. Just buy it! It will never make you disappointed.
